rules.rule: Every procedure assembled into a package MUST carry the warnings scoped to it.
Prerequisites expand transitively up to depth 3; circular dependencies are blocking findings.
Procedures with `surface=physical-installation` MUST attach visual-intent + component-visibility.
Troubleshooting symptoms MUST resolve to ≥1 recovery procedure or an explicit escalation tier.
Onboarding assemblies MUST attach guidance-triggers and a cognitive-load assessment per included procedure.
Onboarding interruption budget ≤ 2 hard-interrupting triggers per session.
Safety-critical warnings (P0) cannot be dropped from any assembly that contains the related procedure.
Default maturity floor `normalized`; publication packages `verified`; RAG-bound packages `canonical-knowledge`.
Assembly ordering is deterministic: declared step-index first, then priority tier, then artifact-id.
